channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-16 to 2026-07-22
item.description: 1 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 09:00, 1.7 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 2 kt WSW, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec). Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 10 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (5.2 sec). Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N). Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.3 sec). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.5 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.5 ft).
item.content:encoded:
1 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 09:00, 1.7 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 2 kt WSW, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 10 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.3 sec).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.5 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.5 ft).
